llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Technical Development
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position • Provide Technical Advisory at respective region through the area of part design, processing, tooling and material in order to achieve manufacturing excellent part performance quality at customers in our Engineering Plastics business. • To optimize product/material processing under trouble shooting at customer location to target excellent part quality. • According to the agreed strategies, policies and practices, provides input and participates in business development and planning, product / processing development and modification, customer intimacy to support the implementation of sales strategies and policies in China at defined sales goal. • Support Application Development and Product Launch initiatives in South China for Engineering Plastics together with commercial team in Project Acquisition and Commercialization for sales Growth. How You Will Do It Market Development • Supports in running projects efficiently and gets the active projects be commercialized. • Advocates in country and regional technical meetings. • Promotes and maintains Market Development through frequent updates on market development activities, and application technologies. • Tra

jobs.title: Assistant Chemist, Alkoxylation
jobs.description: About The Role Located in BCCS lab Jinshan. Afternoon to night shift to handle the alkoxylation 5L alkox reactor, including materials treatment, reactor DCS operation, reactor cleaning and maintenance Be responsible for execution and optimization of synthesis in local and regional innovation development projects Safety and lab cleaning for responsible lab / reactor / control room area How You Will Do It Pass the certification exam of authority for alkoxylation reactor operation. Pass the internal certification exam of EM research for alkoxylation reactor operation. Need to be expertise on reactor PID, setting, DCS system and reaction system. Project Support Execute local and regional innovation synthesis projects based on alkox surfactants Route cause analysis of chemical reactions Summary of results and supporting materials Key interfaces: AT/TS and development teams G-EMH/RA and G-EMI/AT Analysis e.g. OHV / CP / color and viscosity Safety coordination Comply with regulations concerning EHS according to BCCS rules and BASF standards according to local given requirements Prepare HIRA and MOC together before lab experiments Act as safety coordinator when assigned What We Look For Ed

jobs.title: Manager, Product Development
jobs.description: About The Role - Coordinates team related topics, such as EHS, IT – topics, etc. - Drives Development projects and topics within the water borne Basecoat Primer technology and ensures know-how exchange and collaboration within the Coatings Business Unit globally./Regionally - Makes sure that Phase gate Projects/Topics are managed on time, in budget guaranteeing proper milestone reviews - Employing the fundamental understanding of Polymer Chemistry and -Physics to set up resin design targets together with the BC – resin team - In depth knowledge of application related aspects for Basecoats and Primers, appearance aspects, performance requirement of coatings from different OEMs - Actively presents information on Basecoat technology to internal and external customers and stakeholders globally as well as to suppliers - Close collaboration with production department to make sure that we are employing the most efficient production - Leads a technical team of 2 - 8 technicians operationally - To Ensure compliance to all required Quality standards (IATF etc.) and maintain certification Lead role in IATF audit to ensure no major NC - Exercise a high level of good housekeeping and Health and

jobs.title: Engineer R&D -  Compounding
jobs.description: How You Will Do It Assist Lab management for routine compounding lab activities and technical support Assist lab manager to manage compounding team members to achieve target KPI and team objectives. Monitoring the compounding process at the pilot plant during development or customer sample production. No customer samples will be produced when the process is not robust (e.g., pelletizing issues, die deposit issues, raw material handling or feeding issues, etc.). Deliver process guidelines and onsite support to setup process parameters when there is new process required. Conduct process DOE and provide process guideline for a challenging product to the PD and related function based on requests. Synthesis lab report and share to stakeholders for the key take outs from the internal/ external studies. Conduct and monitor compounding process scale up and plant support Assist lab manager to verify the compounding process window prior to PTO at the plant and sharing the findings with the MTC and operation team. Collaborating with PD, MTC, and operation teams to identify and implement improvement plans when production challenges are expected during the development process. Attending critica

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Technical Development (Nansha)
jobs.description: How You Will Do It Provide on time technical service to customer - Executes and achieve trial (new product introduction) and troubleshooting requests - Performs formulation modifications, evaluations and testing base on customer needs - Follows up development of new customers, applications and relevant processing technologies - Provide necessary technical training/workshop/exchange with customer Technical activities knowhow documentation - Communicates and documents (internal and externally) all processing technologies trends - Documentation of all opportunities in salesforce - Document all technical related activities (trial report/trouble shooting report/lab working report etc) - Collects market information (competitors, customers, regulations, etc.) new ideas for R D proposal - Supports build up regional technical capability and fosters expertise exchange between countries Support function (PM,QM,MM,EHS, PD etc) on quality/material/product analysis/registration/optimization etc - Initiate New Article registration and ensure compliance to formulation change process BOM’s consistence - Supports evaluation of alternative raw materials - Create related technical documents (TDS,BOM,B

jobs.title: Chemist/Senior Chemist, Analytical Science (Spectroscopy)
jobs.description: About The Role As a chemist/senior chemist candidate in the Structural Elucidation laboratory provides technical solutions for routine and complex analytical assignments using spectroscopy techniques How You Will Do It Under supervision from lab leader/senior chemist, independently perform FTIR and NMR analysis tasks. Analyze, interpret results, and prepare technical reports. Capable of communicate with internal partners for the understanding of their analytical service requirement and result interpretation. Ability to organize tasks and set priorities to ensure timely data delivery to customer. Perform general lab assignments (e.g., chemical inventory and lab housekeeping) as assigned. What We Look For Master in analytical sciences, chemistry or material science At least 2 years' experience of conducting NMR experiment and interpretation; Must be able to demonstrate hands-on practice on IR, NMR etc. as main task during past work period Experience with interpretation of NMR spectra for structural elucidation is mandatory Familiar with polymer system is a plus Good English and Chinese skills EHS Awareness Data IP Security Awareness 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用

jobs.title: Postdoc, Solid Process
jobs.description: About The Role You will work as an expert in process research and development, focusing on solid process and engineering . How You Will Do It Be responsible for compliance to EHS rules in your area of activity. Initiates safety review for experiments and ensures compliance to measures. Initiate, manage, constantly discuss, and align research projects with other project partners including product development, technical groups, production, universities, etc. to develop solid handling, drying, mixing, extrusion and other relevant processes. Your expertise and results will be applied to both research and operation. Provide technical support for business units in Asian Pacific region on related process development and optimization, troubleshooting, debottlenecking on field of solid characterization, conveying, drying, mixing, extrusion, etc. Design, instruct, and coach lab members for project experiments, closely watching and achieving project milestones, timeline and budget, present and document results, file patents. Join the expert network within the BASF global R D community, operational units, technologies, and scientific partners to maintain state of the art expertise as well as m

jobs.title: Intern, Lab (TS)(002579)
jobs.description: Main Tasks 1. Perform lab testing 2.Support on lab management and sampling 3. Daily routine lab work and tasks assigned by supervisor Requirements 1. Bachelor degree or above, chemical background 2. Onboard physical check needed 3. Attendance: 3-4 days/week, 6 months 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。

jobs.title: Post-doc, R&D (006902)
jobs.description: Main Tasks • Develop technical solutions using existing and new technologies, methods etc. • Transform the project objectives into work plans for lab team, analyze & interpret experimental results. • Develop new methods and procedures for synthesis, testing or analysis. • Constantly discuss and align research activities with other project parties. • Closely watching and achieving project milestones, timeline and budget. • Present and document results, file patents. • Continuously observe, analyse and assess scientific and technical trends in products, processes, applications, industries. • Closely follow and evaluate scientific literature, publications, IP and draw conclusions for BASF. • Develop ideas for new research projects & topics and discuss within the relevant research and business community. Requirements • PhD in polymer chemistry or polymer physics • Better to have water-based coating/adhesive background • Fluent English (reading, writing and presenting) 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用。
